changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-treesitter/src/watcher.rs (65.1% coverage, 41/63 lines)

Uncovered code:
- start() method - the async file watching setup and event loop (lines 119-160)
  - Creates AsyncDebouncer, starts watching recursively
  - Spawns event handler task that categorizes events into changed/removed
  - Calls callback.on_files_changed() and callback.on_files_removed()

This is the core file watching functionality. Testing requires creating temp files, modifying them, and verifying callbacks fire. The debounce logic (500ms) needs careful async test timing."
